transcript:
CALLER: Hi there. I need to move my Saturday appointment to sometime next week. I have a family function.
AGENT: Of course! Celebrations take priority. Name and appointment details please?
CALLER: Smita Parekh. Saturday 10 AM with Dr. Kavitha Reddy.
AGENT: Got it. Dr. Reddy has openings next week on Tuesday at 11 AM and Thursday at 3 PM.
CALLER: Tuesday 11 AM works perfectly.
AGENT: Rescheduled! Smita Parekh, Tuesday at 11 AM with Dr. Kavitha Reddy. Enjoy your family function!
CALLER: Thank you so much, very sweet of you.
